name: Stakk Limited
analysis: SKK has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 61% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.0290, stop A$0.0248, target A$0.0340 (1.18:1) — then trail it.
